questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Taj Mahal, which is a renowned mausoleum located in Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is an ivory-white marble mausoleum on the right bank of the Yamuna River, about 20 kilometers from the heart of Agra. The Taj Mahal is an iconic example of Mughal architecture, recognized for its aesthetic beauty and historical significance. It was commissioned in 1631 by the fifth Mughal emperor, Shah Jahan, to house the tomb of his beloved wife, Mumtaz Mahal. The Taj Mahal is also known as the "Jewel of the World" and has been designated as a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1983.
